evals.prompt: Our iOS push opt-in rate is only 20%. How do we increase it?
evals.expected_output: Push primer strategy with in-app message before OS prompt, with benchmarks

assertions.name: push_primer_pattern
assertions.description: Response must explain the push primer pattern — showing a custom in-app message before the OS permission prompt

assertions.name: ios_permission_permanence
assertions.description: Response must mention that iOS push permission denial is permanent (user must go to Settings to re-enable)

assertions.name: benchmark
assertions.description: Response must provide opt-in rate benchmarks (50-70% with primer vs 30-40% without)

evals.prompt: How should I design a push notification strategy for an e-commerce app with 200K MAUs?
evals.expected_output: Push strategy covering use cases, frequency, segmentation, and timing

assertions.name: use_case_types
assertions.description: Response must cover multiple push use cases (transactional, promotional, re-engagement, cart abandonment)

assertions.name: frequency_guidelines
assertions.description: Response must include frequency capping recommendations (e.g., max 1-2 promotional per day)

assertions.name: segmentation
assertions.description: Response must recommend behavioral segmentation for targeting push messages

evals.prompt: How do I set up push notifications in Braze with rich media and deep links?
evals.expected_output: Braze-specific push setup with rich push and deep linking configuration

assertions.name: braze_push_setup
assertions.description: Response must reference Braze push configuration (APNs/FCM setup, SDK integration)

assertions.name: rich_push
assertions.description: Response must explain rich push features (images, action buttons, push stories)

assertions.name: deep_linking
assertions.description: Response must explain deep linking configuration to navigate users to specific app screens
